tasks.title: Task files and orchestration rules
passes: paired markdown/json task files exist
all later modules have dependencies and local pass gates

tasks.title: Scene contracts and shared state boundary
passes: scene/runtime types compile
legacy snapshot can map into new in-memory shape
no renderer path switched yet

tasks.title: Legacy snapshot read bridge
passes: legacy snapshot loads into new contracts
no new renderer path is required for migration

tasks.title: XyFlow shell, camera, and fallback switch
passes: new shell mounts
pan/zoom/fit works
legacy shell remains switchable

tasks.title: Project and worktree node projection
passes: project/worktree nodes render in XyFlow
drag path no longer depends on legacy overlap solving per frame

tasks.title: Terminal runtime containment and LOD
passes: focused terminal stays live
visible non-focused terminals can degrade safely
offscreen terminals do not keep full DOM cost

tasks.title: Selection, focus, delete, and keyboard merge
passes: box select/delete/focus cycle/pan helpers work end to end
selection sources are unified

tasks.title: Internal annotation subsystem
passes: draw/save/restore/delete works
annotations stay aligned with viewport
no second canvas library introduced

tasks.title: Default-path switch and v2 write path
passes: legacy workspaces open
new snapshots save and reload consistently
new canvas is default with hidden fallback

tasks.title: Render audit, selector tightening, and final closure
passes: single-node drag updates only affected subtrees
offscreen nodes do not dominate render cost
terminal DOM cost is bounded by LOD policy
